cleavage agent: digested with sequencing grade modified trypsin
enrichment method: RNP affinity purification through streptavidin (SA)-binding 4xS1m aptamers
fractionation method: loaded onto a 5 ml 5–20% sucrose gradient
fragmentation method: acquire higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD) MS/MS scans
instrument: coupled online to an Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer
labeling: Each sample was labeled with a distinct TMT label (TMTsixplex)
